ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "part_no" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each part */,
  "od" REAL /* Outer diameter of the component */,
  "id" REAL /* Inner diameter of the component */,
  "shoulder_length" REAL /* Shoulder length of the component */,
  "shank_length" REAL /* Shank length of the component */,
  "overall_length" REAL /* Overall length of the component */,
  "id_tap" TEXT /* Type of tap used with the component */,
  "id_depth" REAL /* Depth of the component */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material type of the component */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the component */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the component specifications */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the component was first added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the component was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_id_tap FOREIGN KEY ("id_tap") REFERENCES tap_types ("tap_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tap_types" (
  "tap_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tap type */,
  "tap_name" TEXT /* Name of the tap type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tap type */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material type of the tap */,
  "thread_pitch" TEXT /* Thread pitch of the tap */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tap type was first added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tap type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tap_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "part_no" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each part */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Current quantity in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the item should be reordered */,
  "last_inventory_check" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory check */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the component is stored */,
  "reserved_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of components reserved for specific projects or orders */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the supplier */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the supplier */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the supplier based on performance and reliability */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms agreed upon with the supplier */,
  "lead_time" TEXT /* Lead time for delivery */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the supplier was first added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the supplier information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "part_no" TEXT /* Part number of the ordered component */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Supplier from whom the order is placed */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of components ordered */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_part_no FOREIGN KEY ("part_no") REFERENCES components ("part_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, manager) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "part_no" TEXT /* Part number of the component */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the specification */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the specification */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User who made the change */,
  "field_changed" TEXT /* Field of the component that was changed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the history record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_history_part_no FOREIGN KEY ("part_no") REFERENCES components ("part_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
